name: Circle Energy, Inc./NV
business: Circle Energy, Inc. is an exploration-stage oil and natural gas company focused on acquiring and developing oil and natural gas properties in the Permian Basin region of Texas. The company currently owns a 75% working interest in an 80-acre tract in Andrews County, Texas, and has not yet drilled any wells or established proved reserves. It generates no revenue and its business strategy is to acquire additional properties and seek financing for drilling and development.

exposures.sentence: We are an exploration-stage oil and natural gas company focused on acquiring and developing oil and natural gas properties in the Permian Basin region of Texas.

catalysts.event: Drill at least two wells under current lease agreement
catalysts.sentence: Under our current lease agreement, we are required to drill at least two wells, one on each 40-acre farmout tract, on or before May 16, 2028 or the rights under the lease to any undrilled tract or tracts will automatically revert to Aspen.
